note: Diagram and product assets under web/profile-viewer/images. For batch export from Adobe Express, prefer Download → pptx, then run scripts/extract-pptx-media.sh on the file and copy from ppt/media/ into images/. Adobe Presentation Template deck: slide 59 (dark-on-white) and slide 60 (light-on-dark) icons live under images/adobe-presentation-template-icons/. label + description power hover tooltips on the canvas. Optional `tags` array per entry (Phase 1): adobe-catalog, adobe-core, experience-cloud, data-collection, profile-audiences, journeys, diagram-reference, presentation-icons, partner.
